# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

interface StreamRequestBody {
  content: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
}

export default async function handler(req: Request) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    const body: StreamRequestBody = await req.json();
    const { content, headers } = body;

    if (!content) {
      return new Response('Missing "content" in request body.', { status: 400 });
    }

    const encoder = new TextEncoder();

    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        if (Array.isArray(content)) {
          for (const chunk of content) {
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(String(chunk)));
          }
        } else {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(String(content)));
        }
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    // Default headers, overridden by user-provided headers
    const responseHeaders = {
      'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
      'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-transform', // Important for streaming
      ...headers,
    };

    return new Response(readableStream, {
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('Error processing request:', error);
    return new Response(`Bad Request: ${error.message}`, { status: 400 });
  }
}
